statusDefinitions.satisfied: Authoritative current evidence proves the requirement at its required proof level.
statusDefinitions.partial: Useful evidence exists, but it does not prove the full requirement or required topology.
statusDefinitions.failed: Current evidence contradicts the requirement or a completed reciprocal review rejected it.
statusDefinitions.pending: The requirement belongs to 0D/final freeze and cannot yet run because prerequisite evidence is rejected.

requirements.requirement: Pin the canonical remote and exact base SHA with toolchain and lockfile identity.
requirements.finding: base.json records the canonical URL, base cbe501ad0f1fa0e51a038e832ad35fce4120321b, observed time, Node/pnpm/OS/kernel/architecture and lockfile hash.

requirements.requirement: Adopt the reviewed plan bundle and establish a phaseStartSha descending from base and plan evidence.
requirements.finding: The checked-in record uses the documented self-SHA exception, while every registered lane and handoff uses a32f509e6d9bd31ba2135940e336729bf90c3d93 and the Git ancestry contains the adopted plan and 0A evidence.

requirements.requirement: Materialize frozen dependencies without changing the lockfile.
requirements.finding: The offline frozen install command, dependency fingerprint and unchanged lockfile are recorded.

requirements.requirement: Capture each of typecheck:workspace, lint:fast, test:workspace:ci, standalone:build and check:ci with exit code, duration and final tail.
requirements.finding: lint:fast and standalone:build were not run; nested typecheck/test lacked independent duration/tail records.

requirements.requirement: Classify every inherited failure and rerun after adopting any base-owned prerequisite fix before dependent admission.
requirements.finding: Two base-owned records/five lint errors have owners and no unknowns, but no post-fix broad rerun is recorded before W1-W6 admission.

requirements.requirement: Start all six lanes from the exact phaseStartSha with packet revision phase-00-r2.
requirements.finding: All producer registry jobs name the same phase start and all handoffs report it.

requirements.requirement: Maintain lane-ledger state, attempt, job/worktree identity, progress and handoff hashes through evidence and review epochs.
requirements.finding: The checked-in lane ledger still reports all lanes unstarted with null jobs/phaseStartSha despite nine completed registry jobs.

requirements.requirement: Admit no lane that depends on an unknown baseline failure.
requirements.finding: The inherited-failure ledger contains zero unknown or base_blocker records.

requirements.requirement: Keep producer and review writes within exclusive owned paths.
requirements.finding: All three reviews independently found lane-owned paths only; this audit also observed only untracked owned additions.

requirements.requirement: Do not implement Phase 1, enable hosted mutation, use a real project/provider, or add hosted terminal behavior.
requirements.finding: Review scope and secret/path scans found no Phase 1/product mutation, real-project/provider use or terminal implementation change.

requirements.requirement: Deliver all six W1 evidence IDs and a standard handoff.
requirements.finding: All files exist, but reciprocal review rejected five evidence groups and approved only the selection invariants.

requirements.requirement: Extract exactly one disposition for every pinned TeamsAPI, ReviewAPI and CrossTeamAPI member and explain count differences.
requirements.finding: The 86/20/3 AST count is reproducible, but heuristic ownership/action/phase assignments are wrong, including TeamsAPI.stop.

requirements.requirement: Map every visible team control to exactly one semantic action or deliberate absence before mount.
requirements.finding: The generator maps JSX sites, including event containment and widget subparts, rather than stable semantic actions; line-based IDs are unstable.

requirements.requirement: Annotate dynamic dispatch and fail a deliberate unannotated fixture.
requirements.finding: The scanner and six-test suite pass the annotated/unannotated dynamic dispatch control, although this does not repair semantic action coverage.

requirements.requirement: Inventory direct Electron, global mega-client and fabricated-success browser paths.
requirements.finding: The source observations are useful, but the 7,095-line raw projection violates evidence-size policy and was rejected for adoption.

requirements.requirement: Capture selection, thin/full snapshot, tombstone, pagination and event/poll race invariants.
requirements.finding: Reciprocal review explicitly approved the invariant document and its labeled proof gaps.

requirements.requirement: Make missing/duplicate signature and semantic action fixtures fail the gate.
requirements.finding: Current fixtures prove one structural row per AST site, not semantic missing/duplicate actions or line-shift-stable IDs.

requirements.requirement: Provide a correct canonical estimate input within evidence/adoption budget.
requirements.finding: Net ranges are arithmetically misreported and W1 emits 48,661 lines without an approved split or external raw-artifact treatment.

requirements.requirement: Separate four provider identities from two execution backend families.
requirements.finding: Reciprocal review approved the topology evidence at source_observed proof level.

requirements.requirement: Map bootstrap, delivery, task, heartbeat and permission operations by direction, caller, authority, idempotency, body IDs, evidence and current route.
requirements.finding: Five useful rows exist, but nested acceptance fields are not schema-enforced and can be deleted without failing the gate.

requirements.requirement: Discover and classify every provider child environment key by provenance and required/optional/forbidden policy.
requirements.finding: The scanner only checks prelisted keys; at least ten explicit source inputs are omitted and an omitted key still passes.

requirements.requirement: Prove browser-session and runtime-ingress authority are disjoint in the proposed mapping.
requirements.finding: The proposed ADR-14 mapping is explicit, but no /api/hosted/v1, /api/runtime/v1, relay or lane credential exists; current callbacks remain mixed under /api/teams.

requirements.requirement: Make Anthropic/Codex/Gemini assumptions and OpenCode differences explicit.
requirements.finding: Provider assumptions and OpenCode-specific processes, journals and routes are explicit and labeled source-observed.

requirements.requirement: Provide a complete positive/negative fake-runtime provider matrix.
requirements.finding: Unsupported backend and malformed capability response cases are absent; future hosted cases are collapsed into one gap row.

requirements.requirement: Use artifact-specific schemas and deliberate negative fixtures for every W2 evidence family.
requirements.finding: The generic schema requires little beyond envelope IDs, and the only negative fixture removes/duplicates a route.

requirements.requirement: Contribute a reconcilable estimate to the canonical unique bucket model.
requirements.finding: W2 invents three top-level IDs instead of mapping low/high ranges and W4 overlap into EST-LIFECYCLE-RUNTIME.

requirements.requirement: Catalog every state family with authority, writers, schema/version, atomicity, corruption policy and backup role.
requirements.finding: The 17-family catalog was accepted as useful at source_observed proof level.

requirements.requirement: Assign each required mutation an honest writer coordination class.
requirements.finding: Twelve operations are classified; unresolved external writes fail closed as quiescent-only/unavailable and control W5 assumptions.

requirements.requirement: Prove an app-only lock does not coordinate an external writer.
requirements.finding: The marker-owned child-process fixture deterministically loses the external update.

requirements.requirement: Fault-characterize TeamBackupService async/sync enumeration, readiness, error swallowing, prune, identity and restore behavior.
requirements.finding: The behavior file records source deductions only; production TeamBackupService is never constructed or fault-injected.

requirements.requirement: Run supported SQLite Online Backup under WAL, reopen independently and fail closed on BUSY/corruption without raw copy.
requirements.finding: The fixture proves live WAL, 2,000-row independent reopen/integrity and injected BUSY/corruption/deadline failure with no DB/WAL/SHM fallback.

requirements.requirement: Prove the SQLite backup operation in the final Node-ABI artifact and deployment recovery topology.
requirements.finding: Only current-host Node ABI 137 is exercised; the production async worker wire op, final image load and deployment quiescence are unverified.

requirements.requirement: Provide a controller-reconcilable W3 estimate without double-counting W5.
requirements.finding: The 4.5k-7.25k decomposition is useful, but R35 says it overlaps W5 and cannot be added until controller reconciliation.

requirements.requirement: Declare the supported final Linux/container/filesystem envelope and run probes in it.
requirements.finding: The envelope is documented, but the observed root Ubuntu host is not the final Debian-slim non-root/init/seccomp/volume topology and Docker access was denied.

requirements.requirement: Prove only one of two final-image containers/manual starts reaches Node/effect code on one supported volume.
requirements.finding: Only current-host contenders were exercised; the mandatory two-container/manual-contender proof did not run.

requirements.requirement: Prove paused/killed owners, duplicate close ordering and anchor replacement cannot overlap.
requirements.finding: Current-host cases pass, but cleanup/zero-residual evidence is hard-coded before ignored cleanup and no final topology ran.

requirements.requirement: Prove descriptor-bound workspace effects and zero outside-marker effects for symlink, rename, bind-mount and stale-generation races.
requirements.finding: Useful current-host races and raw Node/Git controls exist, but cleanup is overstated, descriptors above 1023 are not closed, and final seccomp/image proof is absent.

requirements.requirement: Prove nonce-ready pidfd/subreaper process ownership, double-fork reap, escalation, EOF and typed drained/unclassified outcomes without numeric-PID fallback.
requirements.finding: Only the main child uses pidfd; descendants are later signaled through reusable numeric PIDs, and residual cleanup claims are not measured.

requirements.requirement: Prove lease/control descriptors do not leak into provider, Git or helper descendants.
requirements.finding: The fixture closes only file descriptors 3-1023, so a canary duplicated above 1023 can survive.

requirements.requirement: Define reproducible native artifacts/manifests and reconcile them with the hosted image inventory.
requirements.finding: A proposal exists, but W6 has no manifest rows/probes for the three W4 binaries, protocol hashes, ordering, image placement or syscall readiness.

requirements.requirement: Keep a single adoption below 1,500 lines or record an approved split.
requirements.finding: W4 correctly reports 1,916 lines and requests a three-part split, but no controller approval/adoption record exists.

requirements.requirement: Pause before/after read, commit, cursor, serialization, listener, replay, compensation and event publication as real crash/resume transitions.
requirements.finding: Commit, compensation and event-publication labels are appended to traces without real scheduled crashes or durable restart transitions.

requirements.requirement: Reproduce cursor-after-read and query-then-listen lost-event schedules.
requirements.finding: Both deliberate negative algorithms lose the injected committed event.

requirements.requirement: Prove accepted SQLite and external-file projection designs converge with duplicates but no gaps across exhaustive schedules.
requirements.finding: The claimed 20 schedules are not exhaustive over required commit boundaries, so convergence is not established.

requirements.requirement: Give every independently censused required mutation one versioned normalized intent/fingerprint and effect class.
requirements.finding: The required mutation census is derived from the generated catalog, so deleting a descriptor also deletes the requirement and the gate remains green.

requirements.requirement: Default unproven/ambiguous external effects to operator_required and never automatic replay.
requirements.finding: Several task/inbox effects are marked idempotent_by_operation_id despite W3 proving writer coordination and durable lookup unproven.

requirements.requirement: Cover schema, fingerprint and key version changes, omitted/default semantics and retained comparison in golden vectors.
requirements.finding: Fingerprint-version and omitted-versus-materialized-default vectors are missing.

requirements.requirement: Avoid storing sensitive command bodies and provide a deduplicated estimate input.
requirements.finding: No sensitive body/secret issue was found, and overlap is acknowledged, but the rejected recovery evidence cannot support the range until corrected and reconciled with W3.

requirements.requirement: Cover restart-safe pairing, device/session renewal/rotation/revoke/reset, expiry, response loss, two tabs, replay and keyring failure.
requirements.finding: Restart re-enables mutation after logout, forget-device and replay-family revocation.

requirements.requirement: Fence reset/challenge issuance on generation-bound typed process drain evidence.
requirements.finding: The model trusts a caller-provided runtimeCount=0 and cannot distinguish drained from unclassified/stale anchor state.

requirements.requirement: Reject direct HTTP, forwarded spoofing, wildcard CORS and sibling authority before cookie/body/idempotency work.
requirements.finding: The fixture ordering is useful, but loopback/HTTPS edge execution was denied and no final trusted CIDR/private-listener topology exists.

requirements.requirement: Keep session authority server-side and avoid durable plaintext recovery credentials.
requirements.finding: The model stores symbolic/server records only, but its admission and reset transitions are unsafe and real SQLite/keyring crash behavior is unverified.

requirements.requirement: Prove exact emitted hosted artifact, worker needs, W4 native artifacts, ABI split and missing/empty stub risks.
requirements.finding: The current build omits internal-storage-worker, retains catch-all stubs and lacks W4 artifact rows; ABI smoke claims have no owned reproducible command/assertion.

requirements.requirement: Prove terminal daemon/gateway/SDK/routes/migrations/artifacts are absent from the v1 hosted image.
requirements.finding: Routes and terminal-named migrations are absent, but terminal packages are copied and PtyTerminalService is emitted; no final allowlisted image exists.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Fastify-5 cookie compatibility from authoritative package metadata before dependency adoption.
requirements.finding: @fastify/cookie is absent and the plan-time 11.0.2 reference was not officially rechecked.

requirements.requirement: Provide a canonical EST-HOSTED-OPS estimate supported by accepted evidence.
requirements.finding: The bucket ID is canonical and overlaps are explicit, but critical auth/artifact assumptions are falsified or missing.

requirements.requirement: Complete reciprocal W1/W2 review and resolve findings before adoption.
requirements.finding: Review completed and rejected both W1 and W2 with ten actionable findings; no correction or re-review exists.

requirements.requirement: Complete reciprocal W3/W5 review and resolve findings before adoption.
requirements.finding: Review completed and rejected both W3 and W5 with six findings; no correction or re-review exists.

requirements.requirement: Complete reciprocal W4/W6 review and resolve findings before adoption.
requirements.finding: Review completed and rejected both W4 and W6 and paired integration with eight findings; no correction or re-review exists.

requirements.requirement: Use self-review diff checks that inspect all untracked producer additions.
requirements.finding: Plain git diff --check was vacuous for W2-W6 all-untracked additions; reviewers compensated with clean no-index checks. W1 alone recorded the extra no-index coverage.

requirements.requirement: Adopt all six reviewed lanes or explicitly reject each through the controller decision register.
requirements.finding: Reviews reject every lane, but the controller-owned decision register still contains only 0A decisions and no contested/rejection outcomes.

requirements.requirement: Freeze exact v1 scope, contract/facet conventions, identity authority, provider topology, state/writer classes, environment policy, host primitives, recovery, auth/proxy, artifacts, terminal absence and Phase 1 prerequisites.
requirements.finding: The register explicitly says these lane-dependent outcomes remain unresolved; rejected evidence cannot freeze them.

requirements.requirement: Regenerate the estimate ledger from all accepted lane inputs using canonical unique buckets and the 28k-45k fail-closed range.
requirements.finding: The shared ledger is still the pre-inventory baseline; W1 arithmetic is wrong, W2 IDs are noncanonical and W3/W5 overlap is unreconciled. W4 also lacks a controller mapping.

requirements.requirement: Run every required final-shape native/container/auth/proxy/artifact proof.
requirements.finding: No admitted final image, two-container lease proof, final seccomp/init/process probe, HTTPS edge schedule, final ABI load or terminal-negative image scan exists.

requirements.requirement: Validate every machine-readable evidence file against a schema that covers its acceptance fields and every scanner/spike with positive and deliberate negative fixtures.
requirements.finding: Multiple gates are structural, shallow, circular or record labels without exercising the claimed boundary.

requirements.requirement: Ensure every state/writer/provider/action row has one correct disposition and owner.
requirements.finding: Action ownership is heuristic/wrong, environment rows are incomplete and recovery classes contradict writer authority.

requirements.requirement: Run the Phase 0 targeted combined checks and required broad repository gates after adoption.
requirements.finding: No adoption exists and this audit was forbidden from running broad/final gates; the only broad evidence is the incomplete/red 0A baseline.

requirements.requirement: Produce a concise Phase 0 completion report with residual risks.
requirements.finding: No controller completion report exists; this document is an acceptance audit and explicitly rejects completion.

requirements.requirement: Generate a Phase 1 JIT packet only from frozen decisions and the current integration SHA.
requirements.finding: No valid Phase 1 packet can be generated while all lane adoptions and freeze decisions are unresolved.

requirements.requirement: Do not prestart Phase 1 workers.
requirements.finding: The audited registry scope contains Phase 0 producers/reviewers only and all reviews report no Phase 1 implementation.
